content: This cycle re-derived every finding independently rather than inheriting cto/6df5bc78's self-report, and reached the same conclusions -- a clean confirmation, not a contradiction. Worth noting as a pattern: this is the first time in this Colony's history that a /ceo:approve-initiative cycle has run against a cto cycle that had already self-sealed 'accept' (as opposed to reviewing a 'needs-approval' staging state, which is the pattern evolve-colony.md/approve-initiative.md's design more obviously anticipates). Not yet 3 occurrences of anything recurring, so no EC crystallized -- just logging the shape of this review for future reference.

Carrying forward, unresolved, the three open items check:6 named: push cba3315 to origin, decide .pmcro/trails/ version-control status, and run brief-session.md for real so the Memory Bank convention becomes a live system rather than a specified-but-dormant one. None are this cycle's to decide -- CEO approves the initiative that already landed; it does not also make the human's outstanding infrastructure decisions on their behalf.
